name: Diabetic Double Fudge Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine, evaporated skim milk, salt, and vanilla until fluffy.
2. Stir in cocoa powder and powdered sugar replacement until a smooth dough forms.
3. Knead the dough with hands until it is well combined.
4. Form the dough into 60 small balls.
5. Dip each ball into semisweet dipping chocolate, ensuring they are completely coated.
6. Place the dipped balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper to cool.
7. Allow the balls to cool completely before dipping again if desired.
Exchanges: 1 Ball = 1/3 Bread, 1/2 Fat, Calories: 50
Source: Diabetic Candy, Cookie and Dessert Cookbook by MaryJane Finsand.
